calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Lois Butler, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff The Tides Center.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Rossoff, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Maria Lemus-Sanchez is present.
Attorney, Chad B. Wyatt, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

The trial date of 11-03-08 is vacated.
